task_description: Build a complete, separate plugin system for NuCRM that is truly open to custom connections. Plugins get their own schema (custom_plugins, plugin_execution_logs), their own engine (lib/plugins/), their own API (/api/tenant/plugins/), and their own UI. This is fully separate from the existing integrations system (which remains for curated first-party providers). Also create proper dev/production docker-compose files.
